---
title: "OXPHOS DAV Pipeline Overview"
subtitle: "Goals, data sources, analysis stages, and current results"
author: "OxPhos DAV project"
date: "2026-05-15"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Purpose

This document is a living overview of the OXPHOS disease-associated variant
pipeline. It records the scientific goals, major data sources, stage contracts,
and current headline results. Detailed implementation notes remain in
`notes/` and stage-specific scripts under `src/`.

## Scientific Goals

| Goal | Operational definition | Main output |
|---|---|---|
| Build an auditable OXPHOS DAV inventory | Retain disease-associated variant records from MITOMAP and ClinVar with explicit source, eligibility, and exclusion metadata | `variants_master_curated.parquet` |
| Classify compensated DAVs | AA-level cDAV: a non-human species carries the human disease amino acid. NT-level cDAV: a non-human species carries the exact human disease codon | `variants_master_classified.parquet` |
| Preserve unresolved and ineligible cases | Use filter-late metadata rather than silent row dropping | classified master, QC files, mismatch logs |
| Map classified variants to structure | Anchor variants in primary and validation OXPHOS structures with chain, residue, and contact provenance | `dar_structure_map.csv`, `dar_contacts_cbcb8A.csv` |
| Identify candidate compensating partners | Test whether structural neighbours of cDAV positions show co-evolutionary enrichment | `all_tested_pairs.csv`, `compensatory_partners.csv` |
| Prepare downstream mechanistic analyses | Support phylogenetic timing, DCA, and mutagenesis/FoldX analyses | `src/phylo/`, `src/mutagenesis/`, HPC scripts |

## Pipeline Diagram

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
  A[Stage 0<br/>Download and reference layer] --> B[Stage 1<br/>Curation]
  B --> C[Stage 2<br/>cDAV classification]
  C --> D[Stage 3<br/>Structural mapping]
  D --> E[Stage 4<br/>Compensating partners]
  E --> F[Stage 5<br/>Phylogenetic timing / HPC]
  D --> G[Mutagenesis / FoldX]
  E --> H[DCA and entropy analyses]

  A1[ClinVar, MITOMAP, HGNC, MANE,<br/>TOGA, PhyloTree, structures] --> A
  C1[AA-level and NT-level cDAV/uDAV calls] --> C
  D1[Primary + validation PDB contact maps] --> D
```

## Data Sources

| Resource | Role | Local path | Current audit note |
|---|---|---|---|
| ClinVar variant summary | Primary nucDNA disease-variant source | `data/raw/annotations/ClinVar_VariantSummary_2026-03-26.txt.gz` | Validated |
| MITOMAP coding variants | Primary mtDNA disease-variant source | `data/raw/annotations/MITOMAP_CodingVariants_2026-03-26.tsv` | Local file validated; remote HTTP 403 documented |
| HGNC OXPHOS gene list | 100-gene target universe and approved symbols | `data/reference/Canonical_OXPHOS_Subunits_HGNC_2026-03-25.csv` | Frozen Stage 0 input |
| MANE GRCh38 v1.5 | Transcript reference metadata | `data/raw/reference/MANE_GRCh38_v1.5_2026-04-18.txt.gz` | Validated |
| TOGA hg38 alignments | nucDNA cross-species AA/codon alignments | `data/alignments/toga_hg38_aa/`, `data/alignments/toga_hg38_codon/` | Used by Stage 2 and downstream phylo |
| mtDNA alignments | mtDNA cross-species AA/codon alignments | `data/alignments/mtdna_aa/`, `data/alignments/mtdna_codon/` | Used by Stage 2 and downstream phylo |
| RCSB PDB structures | OXPHOS CI-CV structural panel | `data/structures/` | Manifest-backed primary and validation models |
| PhyloTree build 17 | mtDNA phylogenetic context | `data/raw/reference/PhyloTree_build_17_2026-03-26.zip` | Validated |
| VertLife mammal tree | Pagel and timing analyses | `data/phylo/species_tree/` | Used by Stage 4/5 |
| MitImpact / dbNSFP / gnomAD | Variant severity and population-frequency annotations | `data/raw/annotations/` | MyVariant/dbNSFP/gnomAD completeness legacy-unchecked; not primary inference filter |
| AAindex | Physicochemical amino acid properties | `data/reference/aaindex_properties_2026-04-07.json` | Frozen Stage 0 reference product |

## Stage Summary

| Stage | Name | Main scripts | Canonical outputs | Current status |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | Download/reference | `src/data_download/00a` through `00i` | raw/reference files, download manifests | Audited and frozen |
| 1 | Curation | `src/data_curation/01_curate_variants.py`; transcript/genomic map builders; sanitation scripts | `variants_master_curated.parquet` | Audited and frozen |
| 2 | Classification | `src/align/*`, `src/classify/00_classify_DAV.py`, `01_audit_exception_candidates.py` | `variants_master_classified.parquet`, classified subsets, QC files | Audited and frozen |
| 3 | Structural mapping | `src/structural/00_map_davs_to_structure.py` | `dar_structure_map.csv`, contact CSVs, structural summaries | Rerun after COXFA4/NDUFA4 boundary fix; ready for re-audit |
| 4 | Compensating partners | `src/structural/01_find_compensating_partners.py` | `all_tested_pairs.csv`, `compensatory_partners.csv`, `concordance_summary.csv` | Rerun after Stage 3 fix; not yet frozen |
| 5 | Phylogenetic timing | `src/phylo/`, `scripts/slurm_*` | IQTree/Pagel manifests and HPC outputs | Active / HPC-bound |
| 6 | Mutagenesis | `src/mutagenesis/`, `tools/foldx/` | FoldX and double-mutant stability outputs | Not started |

## Current Headline Results

### Variant Inventory and Classification

| Metric | Count |
|---|---:|
| HGNC OXPHOS target genes | 100 |
| mtDNA genes | 13 |
| nucDNA genes | 87 |
| Curated interpretation rows | 33,779 |
| mtDNA curated rows | 388 |
| nucDNA curated rows | 33,391 |
| Classified rows | 6,809 |
| Classified clean rows | 6,340 |
| Classified warning rows | 469 |
| Unresolved rows | 68 |
| Classification QC checks | 6 checks, 0 failures |

| Genome | Classified | AA-cDAV | NT-cDAV | AA-cDAV % | NT-cDAV % |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| mtDNA | 323 | 167 | 149 | 51.70 | 46.13 |
| nucDNA | 6,486 | 2,046 | 1,745 | 31.54 | 26.90 |

### Cross-source mtDNA Linkage

| Metric | Count |
|---|---:|
| Shared unique ClinVar/MITOMAP mtDNA nucleotide events | 234 |
| ClinVar mtDNA rows present in MITOMAP | 468 |
| ClinVar mtDNA rows absent from MITOMAP | 4,114 |
| Unique ClinVar mtDNA variant IDs absent from MITOMAP | 2,057 |

### Structural Mapping

| Metric | Count |
|---|---:|
| Classified rows loaded | 33,779 |
| Unique source-variant summaries | 17,167 |
| Mapping-eligible variants | 6,673 |
| Unique variants with at least one structural map | 6,326 |
| Eligible but failed | 347 |
| True mapping rate | 94.8% |
| Structure map rows | 37,549 |
| Canonical contact rows | 64,968 |
| Validation contact rows | 29,231 |
| Union contact rows | 94,199 |
| Canonical mito-nuclear contact rows | 1,208 |

| Mapping support class | Variant summaries |
|---|---:|
| Primary and validation | 2,872 |
| Primary only | 3,454 |
| Validation only | 0 |
| Unmapped | 10,841 |

| Structural status category | Model rows |
|---|---:|
| structural_ineligible | 27,106 |
| mapped_direct | 8,321 |
| mapped_with_extended_offset_rescue | 1,130 |
| mapped_with_isoform_offset | 320 |
| secondary_not_attempted | 306 |
| mature_offset_candidate | 198 |
| residue_anchoring_failure | 151 |
| chain_assignment_or_model_gap | 17 |

### Gene-symbol Boundary

The frozen HGNC source uses `COXFA4` as the approved analytical symbol and
`NDUFA4` as a previous/resource symbol. Structural resources still commonly use
`NDUFA4`. Current Stage 3 outputs therefore separate:

| Field | Meaning | Example |
|---|---|---|
| `interpreted_gene`, `dar_locus`, `contact_gene` | HGNC/classification analytical key | `COXFA4` |
| `structure_gene`, `dar_structure_gene`, `contact_structure_gene` | PDB/UniProt structural-resource key | `NDUFA4` |

Current validation after rerun:

| Check | Result |
|---|---:|
| NDUFA4 values in analytical structural fields | 0 |
| COXFA4 DAR contact rows with NDUFA4 structural provenance | 140 |
| COXFA4 contact-neighbour rows with NDUFA4 structural provenance | 131 |
| COXFA4 DAR rows in `all_tested_pairs.csv` | 19 |
| Duplicate primary partner tuples after alias fix | 0 |

### Compensating Partners

| Output | Rows | Interpretation |
|---|---:|---|
| `all_tested_pairs.csv` | 9,068 | All tested cDAV-contact pairs |
| `compensatory_partners.csv` | 199 | Significant derived view |
| `concordance_summary.csv` | 1,447 | Per-cDAV contact-enrichment summary |

Stage 4 currently includes Fisher's exact test, Pagel's discrete test where
available, and branch co-occurrence from ancestral state maps. Fisher is retained
for comparison and should not be treated as the sole primary phylogenetic
evidence.

## Structural Source Panel

| Complex | Primary model | Validation models | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| CI | 9I4I | 9TI4 | Active human complex I model plus alternative mitochondrial context |
| CII | 8GS8 | none | Ubiquinone-bound human complex II |
| CIII | 9HZL | none | Human complex III dimer |
| CIV | 9I7U | 9I6F | NDUFA4-bound mature state retained as primary despite lower resolution than assembly intermediate |
| CV | 8H9S | 8H9U, 8H9T | ATP synthase rotational-state validation; 8H9U priority above 8H9T |

## Known Caveats

| Caveat | Current handling |
|---|---|
| MyVariant/dbNSFP/gnomAD completeness | Marked legacy-unchecked; not used as a primary inference filter |
| MITOMAP programmatic access | Local file validated; remote HTTP 403 documented |
| mtDNA ClinVar rows | Retained for traceability, linked to MITOMAP where possible, ineligible for nuclear comparative branch |
| Residual unresolved nucDNA rows | Retained as unresolved, never forced into uDAV |
| Structural mappability | Structural conclusions conditioned on mapping eligibility/support class |
| Duplicate protomers | Gene-level mapping is usable; protomer-specific claims require caution |
| Local Pagel runtime | Full phylogenetic testing is HPC-bound; local runs may be incomplete or partial |

## Next Steps

| Area | Next action |
|---|---|
| Stage 3 freeze | Re-audit post-COXFA4/NDUFA4 outputs and add Stage 3 artifacts to the freeze registry if clean |
| Stage 4 validation | Confirm partner calls after full HPC phylogenetic outputs are available |
| Stage 5 | Regenerate/submit IQTree and Pagel HPC jobs from current `all_tested_pairs.csv` |
| Mutagenesis | Start FoldX/FoldX-like stability analysis for prioritized cDAV-partner pairs |
| Manuscript figures | Convert headline tables into publication figures once frozen stages are locked |
